evals.prompt: Monitor my PR until CI passes and it's ready to merge
evals.expected_output: The watcher script runs in continuous --watch mode, polling CI status, review comments, and mergeability. Reports progress updates and stops when PR is ready to merge or requires user intervention.
assertions: The agent invokes gh_pr_watch.py with --watch or --once
The agent inspects the actions list from the JSON output
The agent continues polling until a strict stop condition is met
The agent reports CI pass/fail counts during monitoring

evals.prompt: There are some failing CI checks on PR #42, can you look into it and retry if it's a flaky failure?
evals.expected_output: The watcher snapshots PR #42, diagnoses CI failures, classifies them as branch-related or flaky, and retries failed jobs if appropriate.
assertions: The agent passes --pr 42 to the watcher script
The agent checks the diagnose_ci_failure action from the output
The agent uses gh run view to inspect failed logs before deciding
The agent retries failed checks only if classified as flaky

evals.prompt: A reviewer left some comments on my open PR, address the actionable ones and keep watching CI
evals.expected_output: The watcher surfaces new review items, the agent addresses actionable comments by patching code and pushing, then resumes monitoring.
assertions: The agent checks process_review_comment action from the output
The agent inspects surfaced review items for actionability
The agent commits review fixes with appropriate message format
The agent resumes watching after pushing the fix

evals.prompt: Hey, just pushed a commit to my feature branch — can you babysit the CI and merge when green?
evals.expected_output: The watcher starts monitoring the PR from the current branch, polls CI, and merges or reports ready-to-merge when all checks pass.
assertions: The agent resolves the PR from the current branch (--pr auto)
The agent starts continuous monitoring mode
The agent checks mergeability and review decision before declaring ready
The agent provides a final summary with SHA, CI status, and merge state
